name: ZEROBASEONE
description: ZEROBASEONE (ZB1) is a nine-member project boy group formed through Mnet's Boys Planet, known for their sweet concept, fresh energy, and explosive global rookie debut.

funFacts: Won first place on Boys Planet finale
Known for his exceptional dance skills
Caring leader who looks after members
Has a soft and thoughtful personality
members.bio: Hanbin is the leader and center of ZEROBASEONE after finishing first on Boys Planet. His powerful dancing and caring leadership keep the group grounded.

popularSongs.title: In Bloom
popularSongs.note: Debut title where Hanbin's center moments framed the group's first stage.

popularSongs.title: Crush
popularSongs.note: Title where Hanbin's main-dancer break anchors the choreography climax.

popularSongs.title: Feel the POP
popularSongs.note: Title where Hanbin's leader-facing camera holds carry the song's intro.

members.distinction: Unlike other ZEROBASEONE members, Hanbin leads as the Boys Planet #1 finisher — an INFP's caretaker style packaged as main-dance center, which is why his center moments read as group-first rather than solo spotlight.
members.fandomChant: ZEROSE chant 'Sung Hanbin!' through his dance breaks and pull out the lion hand-sign during his solo lines.

funFacts: Worked as an actor before joining ZB1
Speaks softly with a warm presence
Known for his thoughtful interview answers
members.bio: Jiwoong is ZB1's oldest member and visual, often compared to a manhwa protagonist. His acting background gives him stage presence and a quiet, warm charisma.

popularSongs.title: In Bloom
popularSongs.note: Debut where Jiwoong's visual moments anchored the MV's emotional cut.

popularSongs.title: Crush
popularSongs.note: Title where Jiwoong's hyung-line composure carries the bridge.

popularSongs.title: Feel the POP
popularSongs.note: Title where Jiwoong's slower phrasing balances the song's tempo.

members.distinction: Unlike other ZEROBASEONE members, Jiwoong brings acting-trained stage presence as the eldest — an INFJ's interior reading channelled into camera holds, which is why his MV scenes do narrative work even without his vocal lines.
members.fandomChant: ZEROSE chant 'Kim Jiwoong!' through his solo lines and shout 'hyung jjang' during his quieter ad-libs.

funFacts: Was second place on Boys Planet
members.bio: Hao is ZB1's main vocalist from China, a classically trained violinist with stable and soaring vocals. He brings instrumental depth and emotion to the group's sound.

popularSongs.title: In Bloom
popularSongs.note: Debut title where Hao's main-vocal bridge defined the song's emotional payoff.

popularSongs.title: Crush
popularSongs.note: Title where Hao's belt sequence anchors the chorus build.

popularSongs.title: Feel the POP
popularSongs.note: Title where Hao's main-vocal hook carries the song's central melody.

members.distinction: Unlike other ZEROBASEONE members, Hao combines classically trained violin technique with main-vocal duties — an INFJ's pursuit of precision that shows up in clean vibrato and long-held notes, which is why his live versions sound nearly identical to studio cuts.
members.fandomChant: ZEROSE chant 'Zhang Hao!' through his high notes and switch to Mandarin 'Hao ge ge' calls on China stops.

funFacts: Known for his soft, honey-toned voice
members.bio: Matthew is ZB1's Korean-Canadian vocalist with a soft, honey-toned voice and warm bright energy. He often interacts in English with global fans.

popularSongs.title: In Bloom
popularSongs.note: Debut where Matthew's tone framed the gentler verses.

popularSongs.title: Crush
popularSongs.note: Title where Matthew's English ad-libs anchor the song's bridge.

popularSongs.title: Feel the POP
popularSongs.note: Title where Matthew's warm-tone delivery balances the chorus burst.

members.distinction: Unlike other ZEROBASEONE members, Matthew handles English-language fan engagement as a Korean-Canadian — an ESFJ's connector instinct that translates short-form streams into international reach, which is why his vlives often outpace the group's official channels.
members.fandomChant: ZEROSE chant 'Seok Matthew!' through his solo lines and respond to his English greetings with the loudest chorus on tour stops.

funFacts: Praised as a vocal prodigy on Boys Planet
Loves composing in his free time
members.bio: Taerae is ZB1's vocal prodigy, with an emotive tone that earned him "vocal genius" reputation on Boys Planet. He composes in his spare time.

popularSongs.title: In Bloom
popularSongs.note: Debut title where Taerae's bridge belt cemented his 'vocal genius' tag.

popularSongs.title: Crush
popularSongs.note: Title where Taerae's pre-chorus delivery defines the song's recognition cue.

popularSongs.title: Feel the POP
popularSongs.note: Title where Taerae's tone smooths the chorus harmonies.

members.distinction: Unlike other ZEROBASEONE members, Taerae writes his own compositions alongside main-vocal duties — an INFP's interior writing voice that shapes how his lines sit in the arrangement, which is why his bridges often feel like solo cuts inserted mid-song.
members.fandomChant: ZEROSE chant 'Kim Taerae!' through his vocal runs and tend to stay silent through his high notes to preserve the live mix.

funFacts: Has soft visual energy with sharp features
members.bio: Ricky is ZB1's Chinese member known for soft yet sharp visuals and an outgoing, playful energy. His bilingual charm bridges Korean and Chinese fans.

popularSongs.title: In Bloom
popularSongs.note: Debut where Ricky's visual cuts paired with the group's introduction.

popularSongs.title: Crush
popularSongs.note: Title where Ricky's playful ad-libs lighten the chorus tone.

popularSongs.title: Feel the POP
popularSongs.note: Title where Ricky's bridge framing carries the song's pop-forward identity.

members.distinction: Unlike other ZEROBASEONE members, Ricky channels Chinese-Korean bilingual playfulness through visual-line duties — an ENFP's social warmth that scales fan engagement across two language markets, which is why his fan-meets in China and Korea both feel like home shows.
members.fandomChant: ZEROSE chant 'Shen Quanrui!' through his solo lines and switch to Mandarin 'Ricky-ge' calls on China stops.

funFacts: One of the tallest in the group at 184cm
members.bio: Gyuvin is ZB1's mood maker — tall, energetic, and quick to make members laugh. His outgoing energy is felt on and off stage.

popularSongs.title: In Bloom
popularSongs.note: Debut where Gyuvin's height frames many of the group formation shots.

popularSongs.title: Crush
popularSongs.note: Title where Gyuvin's dance break adds the energy spike.

popularSongs.title: Feel the POP
popularSongs.note: Title where Gyuvin's mood-making ad-libs lift the chorus.

members.distinction: Unlike other ZEROBASEONE members, Gyuvin works the mood-maker role on top of dancer-vocalist duties — an ESFP's spotlight comfort that turns variety-show segments into clips that get pinned, which is why his off-stage edits trend faster than his stages.
members.fandomChant: ZEROSE chant 'Kim Gyuvin!' through his dance-break sections and tend to laugh-chant during his variety-show punchlines.

funFacts: Strong stage charisma despite shy nature
members.bio: Gunwook is ZB1's reserved rapper with a distinctive tone and sparkly star-like eyes. His on-stage charisma surprises fans who only know his shy off-stage side.

popularSongs.title: In Bloom
popularSongs.note: Debut title where Gunwook's rap section reframes the verses.

popularSongs.title: Crush
popularSongs.note: Title where Gunwook's rap break carries the song's pivot.

popularSongs.title: Feel the POP
popularSongs.note: Title where Gunwook's rap-tone delivery contrasts the bright chorus.

members.distinction: Unlike other ZEROBASEONE members, Gunwook delivers rap parts with an ISFP's introspective restraint — his bars feel pulled in rather than projected outward, which is why his sections often function as the song's reset rather than its peak.
members.fandomChant: ZEROSE chant 'Park Gunwook!' through his rap bars and tend to wave star-themed fan kits during his close-ups.

members.bio: Yujin is ZB1's youngest member — a tall maknae with a puppy-like charm and surprising thoughtfulness for his age. The hyungs dote on him constantly.

popularSongs.title: In Bloom
popularSongs.note: Debut where Yujin's maknae moments anchored the MV's gentler scenes.

popularSongs.title: Crush
popularSongs.note: Title where Yujin's chorus delivery adds the song's emotional cushion.

popularSongs.title: Feel the POP
popularSongs.note: Title where Yujin's bright delivery rounds out the harmonies.

members.distinction: Unlike other ZEROBASEONE members, Yujin balances maknae duties with an ESTP's quick-reaction stage instinct — he's the youngest but his timing on camera is the surest, which is why he's often used as the chorus's recurring camera anchor.
members.fandomChant: ZEROSE chant 'Han Yujin!' through his solo lines and switch to 'puppy maknae!' calls during his soft-tone bridges.

seo.description: Create your ZEROBASEONE name with Sung Hanbin, Zhang Hao, Han Yujin & all 9 members! Instant chemistry scores & Korean stage names. Perfect for ZEROSE fanfiction.
